title: nephrodium scandicinum
intro: Nephrodium scandicinum is a species of fern, a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Matoniaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nephrodium scandicum include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used in folk remedies to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
